parameters.content:
## WF1 - QR Scan + Web App (dynamic ads)
GET /scan?machineId=machine-001
1. RPC fn_scan_session: creates pending session + resolves active APPROVED ad for the machine.
2. Build Page injects __SESSION_ID__ and __AD_JSON__ into the web app HTML.
   __AD_JSON__ is script-safe: '<' escaped as \u003c after JSON.stringify.
3. Serve HTML (200). AD=null in the page keeps the built-in GLOW placeholder.
Error path (RPC failure OR ok:false/missing session) -> Serve Error Page (503 friendly HTML).

parameters.responseBody:
Covered by Mills

⏳ One moment

This machine is temporarily unavailable - please try again shortly.
